---
title: "GeneKeepR: A Colony Manager's Tutorial (retired)"
---

**This tutorial has been retired (2026-07-17).** Its content -- purpose,
approach, and a tab-by-tab walkthrough -- has been ported, modernized, and
re-verified against the current modular application into the public article
["nprcgenekeepr: Purpose, Approach, and a Colony Manager's Guide to
Practice"](articles/colony-manager-guide.qmd), part of the package's online
documentation at <https://rmsharp.github.io/nprcgenekeepr/>.

This file was already excluded from the built package (`.Rbuildignore`) and
was never part of the public pkgdown site; it is kept only as a historical
record and is not maintained further. See `docs/planning/document2-colony-manager-guide-plan.md`
§12 decision 3 and `CHANGELOG.md`'s Session 398 entry for the retirement
decision.
